text.message: Green, you can’t honestly think I’m your dev competition..
He has a great setup, don’t let him get rolling..
Red if you want sheep i can trade
Maybe not feed green the win?
I take it back. I feel a little bad for 6 devs that are all knights.
Oops. That was supposed to be a brick
Didnt double check before accepting bank trade :(
I double popped for 2 knights.. Hiw are there
